title: phaeopappus decurrens var. gymnocladus

side_effects: Phaeopappus decurrens var. gymnocladus can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and digestive issues. Consuming large amounts of the plant's extracts may lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, improper use of the plant can also cause more severe side effects, including anaphylaxis, seizures, and respiratory failure.
